cypher.A:
MATCH (c:City {id:$entityId})
WITH c, COALESCE(c[$attr + '_history'], []) AS history
UNWIND history AS chunk
WITH c, apoc.convert.fromJsonMap(chunk) AS hist
WHERE hist.start <= $time AND (hist.end IS NULL OR hist.end >= $time)
RETURN c.id AS entity_id, $attr AS attribute, hist.value AS value, hist.start AS start, hist.end AS end
ORDER BY hist.start DESC
LIMIT 1
cypher.B:
MATCH (s:City_State {id:$entityId})
WHERE s.start <= $time AND (s.end IS NULL OR s.end >= $time)
RETURN s.id AS entity_id, $attr AS attribute, s[$attr] AS value, s.start AS start, s.end AS end
ORDER BY s.start DESC
LIMIT 1
cypher.C:
MATCH (c:City {id:$entityId})-[:HAS_PROCESS {attr:$attr}]->(head:ProcessNode)
CALL (head) {
  WITH head
  MATCH (head)-[:NEXT_STATE*0..]->(node:ProcessNode)
  WHERE node.start <= $time AND (node.end IS NULL OR node.end >= $time)
  RETURN node
  ORDER BY node.start DESC
  LIMIT 1
}
WITH c, node
RETURN c.id AS entity_id, $attr AS attribute, node.value AS value, node.start AS start, node.end AS end

cypher.A:
MATCH (c:City {id:$entityId})
UNWIND COALESCE(c[$attr + '_history'], []) AS chunk
WITH c, apoc.convert.fromJsonMap(chunk) AS hist
RETURN c.id AS entity_id, hist.start AS start, hist.end AS end, hist.value AS value
ORDER BY hist.start
cypher.B:
MATCH (s:City_State {id:$entityId})
WHERE s[$attr] IS NOT NULL
RETURN s.id AS entity_id, s.start AS start, s.end AS end, s[$attr] AS value
ORDER BY s.start
cypher.C:
MATCH (c:City {id:$entityId})-[:HAS_PROCESS {attr:$attr}]->(head:ProcessNode)
MATCH (head)-[:NEXT_STATE*0..]->(node:ProcessNode)
RETURN c.id AS entity_id, node.start AS start, node.end AS end, node.value AS value
ORDER BY node.start

cypher.A:
MATCH (c:City {id:$entityId})-[r]->(target:Region)
WHERE type(r) = $relType
  AND r.start <= $time AND (r.end IS NULL OR r.end >= $time)
RETURN c.id AS entity_id, type(r) AS rel_type, target.id AS target_id, r.start AS start, r.end AS end
cypher.B:
MATCH (s:City_State {id:$entityId})
WHERE s.start <= $time AND (s.end IS NULL OR s.end >= $time)
WITH s ORDER BY s.start DESC LIMIT 1
MATCH (s)-[r]->(t:Region_State)
WHERE type(r) = $relType
  AND t.start <= $time AND (t.end IS NULL OR t.end >= $time)
RETURN s.sid AS state_sid, t.sid AS target_sid, t.id AS target_id
cypher.C:
MATCH (c:City {id:$entityId})-[:HAS_PROCESS {attr:$relAttr}]->(head:ProcessNode)
CALL (head) {
  WITH head
  MATCH (head)-[:NEXT_STATE*0..]->(node:ProcessNode)
  WHERE node.start <= $time AND (node.end IS NULL OR node.end >= $time)
  RETURN node
  ORDER BY node.start DESC
  LIMIT 1
}
WITH c, node
WHERE node IS NOT NULL
MATCH (node)-[r]->(target:Region)
WHERE type(r) = $relType
RETURN c.id AS entity_id, target.id AS target_id, node.start AS start, node.end AS end

cypher.A:
MATCH (c:City)-[r]->(region:Region {id:$regionId})
WHERE type(r) = $relType
  AND r.start <= $time AND (r.end IS NULL OR r.end >= $time)
UNWIND COALESCE(c[$attr + '_history'], []) AS chunk
WITH c, region, apoc.convert.fromJsonMap(chunk) AS hist
WHERE hist.start <= $time AND (hist.end IS NULL OR hist.end >= $time)
  AND hist.value >= $minValue
RETURN c.id AS city_id, region.id AS region_id, hist.value AS value
ORDER BY hist.value DESC
LIMIT 20
cypher.B:
MATCH (region:Region_State {id:$regionId})
WHERE region.start <= $time AND (region.end IS NULL OR region.end >= $time)
MATCH (s:City_State)-[r]->(region)
WHERE type(r) = $relType
  AND s.start <= $time AND (s.end IS NULL OR s.end >= $time)
  AND s[$attr] IS NOT NULL AND s[$attr] >= $minValue
RETURN s.id AS city_id, region.id AS region_id, s[$attr] AS value, s.sid AS state_sid
ORDER BY value DESC
LIMIT 20
cypher.C:
MATCH (region:Region {id:$regionId})
WITH region
MATCH (city:City)-[:HAS_PROCESS {attr:$relAttr}]->(relHead:ProcessNode)
CALL (relHead) {
  WITH relHead
  MATCH (relHead)-[:NEXT_STATE*0..]->(relNode:ProcessNode)
  WHERE relNode.start <= $time AND (relNode.end IS NULL OR relNode.end >= $time)
  RETURN relNode
  ORDER BY relNode.start DESC
  LIMIT 1
}
WITH city, region, relNode
WHERE relNode IS NOT NULL
MATCH (relNode)-[r]->(region)
WHERE type(r) = $relType
WITH city, region
MATCH (city)-[:HAS_PROCESS {attr:$attr}]->(attrHead:ProcessNode)
CALL (attrHead) {
  WITH attrHead
  MATCH (attrHead)-[:NEXT_STATE*0..]->(attrNode:ProcessNode)
  WHERE attrNode.start <= $time AND (attrNode.end IS NULL OR attrNode.end >= $time)
  RETURN attrNode
  ORDER BY attrNode.start DESC
  LIMIT 1
}
WITH city, region, attrNode
WHERE attrNode IS NOT NULL AND attrNode.value >= $minValue
RETURN city.id AS city_id, region.id AS region_id, attrNode.value AS value
ORDER BY value DESC
LIMIT 20
